# Copilot Instructions for Hotel Visiting Site

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is a Next.js hotel visiting site built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, following MVC (Model-View-Controller) architecture patterns.

## Architecture Guidelines
- **Models**: Located in `src/models/` - Define data structures, types, and business logic
- **Views**: React components in `src/components/` and pages in `src/app/` - Handle UI rendering
- **Controllers**: API routes in `src/app/api/` and service functions in `src/services/` - Handle business logic and data processing

## Code Style Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all files
- Follow React functional components with hooks
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Implement responsive design patterns
- Use proper error handling and loading states
- Follow Next.js App Router conventions

## Hotel Site Features
- Hotel listings and search functionality
- Room booking system
- User authentication
- Review and rating system
- Payment integration placeholder
- Admin dashboard for hotel management

## Best Practices
- Use proper TypeScript types and interfaces
- Implement proper error boundaries
- Use Next.js Image component for optimized images
- Follow accessibility guidelines
- Implement proper SEO meta tags
- Use server components where appropriate
- Implement proper loading and error states
